name: Margarita Sunrise
recipeInstructions:
1. Fill a glass with 3 cups of cracked ice.
2. Add the lime halves and 1 granulated sugar to the glass.
3. Stir until dissolved.
4. Add the powdered sugar, tequila, and frozen orange juice concentrate (or fresh orange juice) to the glass.
5. Garnish with an extra sprinkle of powdered sugar if desired.
6. Serve immediately and enjoy your refreshing Margarita Sunrise!
